title: Compact Fire
description: Compact Fire is a resource pack that significantly reduces the flame effect that covers your screen when you burn. This allows you to maintain clear vision and move more easily, especially in combat situations.
body:
Are you tired of the fire overlay that completely covers your screen when you catch fire in Minecraft? The Compact Fire resource pack is designed to solve exactly that problem. This simple and useful pack significantly reduces the size and intensity of the fire overlay.

With this pack, your field of view stays clearer even when you're on fire. This allows you to see your surroundings clearly and fight enemies more comfortably when they set you on fire or when you get too close to a fire source. Compact Fire makes your Minecraft experience less distracting and more functional.

Installation is very simple. Just place the downloaded .zip file into your resourcepacks folder, which you can access from the Minecraft main menu by going to Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder. Once you enable the pack, you will see the changes instantly.

I hope Compact Fire makes your Minecraft adventure more enjoyable and less confusing!
